name: lautfm-mcp
description: MCP server for the laut.fm Radioadmin API. Manage radio stations, playlists, tracks, schedules, users, live streaming, and automation algorithms.

tools.name: get_server_status
tools.description: Check the laut.fm Radioadmin API server status

tools.name: list_stations
tools.description: List all stations accessible with the current token

tools.name: get_station
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific station

tools.name: update_station
tools.description: Update station information (description, format, djs, location, website, twitter_name, facebook_page, instagram_name, genres)

tools.name: get_station_state
tools.description: Check if a station is active and playing on a streaming server

tools.name: activate_station
tools.description: Activate a station — triggers a playlist export and starts the station on a streaming server if assigned and not running

tools.name: get_current_playlist
tools.description: Get the currently playing playlist and its tracks for a station

tools.name: get_listener_stats
tools.description: Get listener statistics for a station (current listeners, position, switchons log, TLH log)

tools.name: get_station_users
tools.description: List all users of a station

tools.name: add_station_user
tools.description: Add a user with a given role to a station (sends an invitation)

tools.name: update_station_user_role
tools.description: Change the role of a user on a station

tools.name: remove_station_user
tools.description: Remove a user from a station

tools.name: get_playlists
tools.description: List all playlists for a station

tools.name: add_playlist
tools.description: Add a new playlist to a station

tools.name: get_playlist
tools.description: Get information for a single playlist including its entries

tools.name: update_playlist
tools.description: Modify an existing playlist for a station

tools.name: delete_playlist
tools.description: Delete a single playlist for a station. The rotation playlist cannot be deleted.

tools.name: add_track_to_playlist
tools.description: Append a single track to a playlist. The track must not already be in the playlist.

tools.name: get_playlist_tracks
tools.description: Get all tracks for a playlist (tracks are unique and not necessarily in playlist order)

tools.name: delete_track_from_playlist
tools.description: Delete all occurrences of a track from a playlist

tools.name: get_schedule
tools.description: Get the schedule for a station

tools.name: update_schedule
tools.description: Modify the schedule for a station

tools.name: search_tracks
tools.description: Search tracks for a station using various filters

tools.name: get_tracks_by_ids
tools.description: Get track information for one or more track IDs

tools.name: update_track
tools.description: Update metadata for a track

tools.name: delete_track
tools.description: Delete an own track from a station

tools.name: get_track_stats
tools.description: Get current day track statistics (play time, listener count, live flag) for a station

tools.name: get_track_stats_period
tools.description: Get track statistics for a specific period. Use '24h' for the last 24 hours or a date in 'yyyy-mm-dd' format.

tools.name: get_track_tags_for_ids
tools.description: Get tags for one or more specific tracks

tools.name: add_track_tags
tools.description: Add tags to one or more tracks

tools.name: remove_track_tags
tools.description: Remove tags from one or more tracks

tools.name: get_all_track_tags
tools.description: Get all tags used across all tracks for a station

tools.name: get_incomplete_tracks
tools.description: Get tracks with incomplete uploads for a station

tools.name: get_queued_tracks
tools.description: Get tracks that are queued for processing for a station

tools.name: get_live_connection_info
tools.description: Get live streaming connection information for a station (server, port, mountpoint, bitrate, samplerate, format, etc.)

tools.name: get_live_password
tools.description: Get the live streaming password for a station

tools.name: get_automation_algorithm
tools.description: View the definition of a specific automation algorithm

tools.name: create_automation_algorithm
tools.description: Create a new automation algorithm for shuffling tracks

tools.name: update_automation_algorithm
tools.description: Update the function used by an existing automation algorithm

tools.name: delete_automation_algorithm
tools.description: Delete an automation algorithm

lautfm_token.title: laut.fm API Token
lautfm_token.description: Your laut.fm Radioadmin API bearer token. You can find this in your laut.fm account settings.
